description: You are a financial analyst. Using the daily revenue data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\finance_data.csv, create a Power BI report aligned with the company's fiscal year (April 1st to March 31st). The report must include a measure named 'Fiscal_YTD' that calculates the running total of Revenue resetting annually on April 1st. Visualize the results in a Clustered Column Chart showing 'Fiscal_YTD' by Month, ensuring the X-axis is sorted chronologically starting from April and ending in March. Save the report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Fiscal_Report.pbix.

metadata.visual_verification_prompt: Look at the chart's X-axis. Does the timeline start with April (Apr) and end with March (Mar)?
